---
name: Rule correctness dispute
about: A rate, threshold, citation, or AY mapping in the library does not match the law.
title: '[RULE] '
labels: rule-correctness
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One sentence: which rule is wrong and how.

## Primary source

- Section / Rule / Circular / Finance Act:
- URL to the primary source (`indiacode.nic.in`,
  `incometaxindia.gov.in`, e-gazette, ICAI Guidance Note):
- Effective Assessment Year:

## Current library output

```ts
// minimal repro that produces the wrong number
```

## Expected output

What the law actually says, and what the library should produce.

## Confidence

- [ ] I have read the primary source linked above.
- [ ] I have checked the relevant AY module under `packages/core/src/`.
- [ ] I am attaching a test case (optional but very welcome).

## Anything else

Cross-references, related rulings, edge cases, or a screenshot of
the bare act if helpful.
